content_body:
January is a beautiful time of year to come to Blue Ridge! After the hustle and bustle of the holidays, these winter months in Blue Ridge have a sort of magic and serenity all their own. While enjoying a lower price tag on your Blue Ridge luxury cabin rental, you can experience as much of Blue Ridge as you want without all the crowds. Below are a few ideas for things to do in Blue Ridge in January.

More Fun Things To Do in Blue Ridge 

Blue Ridge Community Theater
Disney’s - Descendants The Musical  

Show Dates:
January 14 – 30 ~ Fridays & Saturdays at 7:30 PM

Sundays at 2:00 PM

It is present-day, and in the kingdom of Auradon, all of Disney’s beloved heroes and royalty are living happily ever after, safe from the terrifying villains and troublesome sidekicks they have banished to the magic-free Isle of the Lost. That is until Ben, the benevolent teenage son of Belle and King Adam (The Beast), offers a chance of redemption for the troublemaking offspring of the evilest villains, Mal.

Evie, Jay and Carlos – the children of Maleficent, the Evil Queen, Cruella De Vil, and Jafar – are welcomed to Auradon Prep to attend school with the children of their parents’ sworn enemies. Now entering a completely foreign world and way of life, the four Villain Kids have a difficult choice to make: should they follow in their parents’ wicked footsteps or learn to be good? 

Based on the popular Disney Channel Original Movies, Disney’s Descendants: The Musical is a brand-new musical comedy featuring the beloved characters and hit songs from the films!

 

Fun Things To Do With Kids

Vertigo Pinball for older kids located on Main Street
Play miniature golf on an 18-hole course meandering through the top floor of an 111 year old hotel at 2nd Story Entertainment on Main Street
Spend an afternoon looking through old comic books and new ones, too at Mountain Man Comics.
Hucks General Store is a favorite for young and old offering old fashioned candy, T-shirts, games, puzzles, specialty food items, and so much more

Something Different To Do!

Axe Throwing Therapy ~ have you ever played Tic-Tac-Toe with an axe? Have fun, get competitive, and relieve some stress!

Hiking

A great time to see the Swinging Bridge over the Toccoa River is during the winter months ~ A beautiful hike to the bridge and across to the other side for more exploring.

Cozy Fires at Your Luxury Cabin

After fun-filled days spending time in the beautiful North GA mountains, come back to your luxury cabin and settle in for the evening with your favorite drink and a lovely fire - either in your wood-burning fireplace, or at the outdoor fire table on your deck, or at the fire pit enjoying s'mores. Getting back to nature and experiencing the cool, crisp mountain breezes will do wonders for your soul.
title: January Things To Do in Blue Ridge 2022
